ddt:Target.Name: RadNav v1.5
ddt:Target.Description:
******************** HISTORY ********************
v0.1 27/04/2012 : Creation and compliance with DTS 1.7 DRAFT v0.2 13/07/2012 : Compliance with DTS 1.8 v0.3 08/10/2012 : - Compliance with DTS 1.9 - Addition of default value for writing configuration parameters - Addition of comments for each data - Deletion of the automatic reset in "write" button and addition of a "reset" button v0.4 04/01/2013 : - Compliance with DTS 2.0 v0.5 30/05/2013 : - Rename of CNF_ECU_FM2 and CNF_CAR_MAN v0.6 26/06/2013 : - CNF_ECU is available in aftersales - Database is available for HFE v0.7 27/06/2013 - CNF_PACT goes from 2000 bytes to 1640 bytes v0.8 08/07/2013 - Compliance with DTS 2.1 v0.9 25/07/2013 - Maintainability report checked for HMI Configuration Read & Write v1.0 17/10/2013 - Compliance with DTS 2.2 & 2.3 v1.1 22/10/2013 - Updated IO Control labels & few Screens v1.2 10/01/2014 - Added DID F013 & automatic refresh issue resolved v1.3 10/03/2014 - Compliance with DTS 2.4 v1.4 30/01/2015 - Compliance with DTS 2.5 & 2.6 & 2.7 v1.5 31/08/2015 - Compliance with DTS 2.8 & 2.9 - Update of Resolution and Offset for CNF_PARGU parameters - Map data country list updated - Description & Mnemonic updated for Read only DID's & IO Controls - Update of Auto identification details

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test not complete since last clear

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test failes since last clear

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: LIN_IN.Info_Aux_IN
Data.Comment: status of auxiliary audio on fascia

Data.Name: Status mask
Data.Comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

Item.Text: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear

Data.Name: ANT1.Frequency value
Data.Comment: Antenna1 Frequency Tune $xxxx [KHz], 1KHz step if AM ex : 585 KHz -> $20 20 35 38 35

Data.Name: CANM.RefMessagerie
Data.Comment: version édition du document décrivant la messagerie CAN-M

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: LIN_IN.Info_Aux_IN_2
Data.Comment: status of auxiliary audio on fascia

Item.Text: No tyre pressure to be dispayed

Data.Name: Radio country
Data.Comment: World area to define tuner frequencies interval

Data.Name: ADAS Configuration.RL_SoundLevelCorrection
Data.Comment: ADAS Sound Level Correction - Right Left

Data.Name: ADAS Configuration.FR_SoundLevelCorrection
Data.Comment: ADAS Sound Level Correction - Front Rear

Data.Name: ADAS Configuration.RC_TrunkDisplay
Data.Comment: Trunk open handling display message presence fro rear camera

Data.Name: ADAS Configuration.RC_TrunkRVCdisable
Data.Comment: Disabled RVC Trunk open handling presence for rear camera

Item.Text: Present with front and rear AAP

Data.Name: ANT2.Frequency value
Data.Comment: Antenna2 Frequency value $xxxx, [MHz], 0.1MHz step if FM ex : 100.3 MHz -> $20 31 30 30 33

Data.Name: CANV.RefMessagerie
Data.Comment: version édition du document décrivant la messagerie CAN-M

Data.Name: MEX.EngineSound_presence
Data.Comment: Engine Sound Enhancement used by MEX

Item.Text: Easy access for driver and passenger
Nav function and Nav HMI enabled
Nav function and Nav HMI disabled

Data.Name: CP_Touch.FreqHoppingRefreshCounterThreshold
Data.Comment: CP_Touch freq hopping refresh counter threshold

Data.Name: CP_Display.VerticalSyncLPulseWidth
Data.Comment: CP_Display vertical sync L pulse width

Data.Name: CP_Display.HorizontalSyncLPulseWidth
Data.Comment: CP_Display horizontal sync L pulse width

Data.Name: CP_Display.TouchscreenControllerI2CBoot
Data.Comment: CP_Display touchscreen controller I2C address (boot mode)

Data.Name: CP_Display.TouchscreenControllerI2COperating
Data.Comment: CP_Display touchscreen controller I2C address (operating mode)

Data.Name: CP_Display.SCGControl
Data.Comment: CP_Display spread spectrum clock generator control

Item.Text: with infotainment AND infotraffic AND S&S

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ECUReset.keyoffon
Request.Comment: Key OFF / Key ON Reset of ECU

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Extended
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportNumberOfDTCByStatusMask
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Label.Text: - force configuration to be taken into account
- reset configuration parameters to default values
Key off / key on reset is used to :
- force configuration to be taken into account
USE WITH CAUTION : once activated, it won't be possible to deactivate it !
USE WITH CAUTION : once activated, it won't be possible to deactivate it !
Those parameters are used to configure NUANCE parameters
These parameters are used to configure ACOUSTIC parameters
Due to DDT tool limitation, this DID is splitted into 2 parts
Write First 2000 Bytes (1-2000) Of Data In Acoustic Parameter Part-1 And Next 1072 Bytes(2001-3072) Of Data In Acoustic Parameter Part-2
Data Present In Acoustic Parameter Part-1 Is First 2000 Bytes (1-2000) And Data Present In Acoustic Parameter Part-2 Is Next 1072 Bytes (2001-3072)
Those parameters are used to configure radio reception parameters
Those parameters are used to configure SPVR parameters
NOTE: Due to DDT Tool constraints, the value should be entered in HEX (3 BYTES)
By using this request, ECU should be able to eject a CD
By using this request, ECU should be able to set a tuner to the requested frequency
This routine is used to test microphone.
ECU generates a sound on the stereo output and checks if the sound is captured by microphone.
By using this request, ECU should be able to issue a tone following loudspeaker line number, frequency and sound level given as parameters.
This routine displays a permanent black screen:
This routine displays a permanent white screen:
This routine displays a cyclic black-white screen sequence (3 times):
If display does not turn back to normal after STOP, please perform a HW reset.
If display does not turn back to normal after STOP, please perform a HW reset.
This routine is used to check rear view camera functionality.
This routine displays rear view picture.
This routine is used to calibrate rear view camera guidelines settings.
If display does not turn back to normal after STOP, please perform a HW reset.
By using this request, ECU should be able to activate System ON level
When requested by diag tool, ECU should send command to reset touch controller
When requested by diag tool, ECU should download parametric guidelines/ Threshold values on USB
